hero.headline: Return To Your Origin
hero.sub: You've felt this before. This isn't random.
hero.cta_primary: You came back for a reason

story: Something in your life doesn't feel right.
You keep ignoring it. It doesn't pass.
You're not stuck. You're just in a life that doesn't match who you are.

philosophy.headline: The Origin
philosophy.body: There wasn't one clean moment. It was a period where everything broke at once. But I didn't stop. That's where Primal Source comes from. It's for those doing the same, even if no one else can see it.

email.headline: Join The Primal Circle
email.sub: First access to drops. No noise.
